then let that number sort of turn over in their brain a little bit, go off
and talk about some other stuff, and then come back and give your
price. So, that builds some tension. "She said a thousand bucks!" And then
watch it, they're hoping it's not gonna be a thousand dollars. But if you give them
a little bit of time for that tension to build, then it can be really powerful to do
that step down to $97. That's a crazy deal. So, this is her price revelation. I
probably would put something else in here to just buy yourself a little time so that
tension can build.
